calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-22-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-22-2006 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Rita Howell.
Michael Hall, Esq. for and with Plaintiff: Betty Yuen.
Brent Anderson, Esq. for and with Defendant: Van Gannaway.
Parties have settled, terms read into the record as follows: Parties stipulated for an Entry of Judgment for restitution and possession of the property located at 1390 Broadway St., #10, San Francisco, Stayed of execution 'til 5:00 P.M. June 6, 2006.
Defendant agreed to vacate the property in undamage condition, any personal property left behind will be disposed of by Plaintiff, No person claiming a right to possession.
If Defendant complies with terms, Plaintiff will waive back rent and UD damages, stipulate to vacate Judgment and Dismissed the action with prejudice.
Defendant waives the return of $200 cleaning/security deposit, each to bear own costs and fees. Plaintiff will refund the $1,100.00 last month rent/deposit to Defendant in exahange for the possession and all keys to the premises.
If Defendant fails to vacate, Plaintiff shall be entitled for a Judgment immediately.
Parties waives claims against each other.
Parties agreed to terms in open court, matter is deemed settled, Trial vacated.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-18-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael C. Hall, Esq. 415-512-9865 for Plaintiff Betty Yuen
Rudy Balderama, Esq. 415-947-0797 Ext. 122 for Defendant Van Gannaway

Settlement Conference Held. Case not settled. Trial date maintained.

Judge Pro Tem Roland Lie, Clerks Melinka Jones & Greg Chuck, not reported (218)
